title: Create: Constructs of the Wild
description: Create: Constructs of the Wild blends the immersive automation of the Create mod and its addons with breathtaking terrain from Tectonic and Terralith.
body:
A world of wonder, powered by gears...

Welcome to Create: Constructs of the Wild, a Modpack that blends the immersive automation of the Create mod and its addons with breathtaking terrain from Tectonic and Terralith, alongside the culinary and survival charm of Farmer’s Delight.

Whether you're building elaborate machines, cultivating rich farmlands, or exploring untamed biomes, this modpack invites you to shape the wild — one gear at a time.

## Mod Highlights:
- Create (of course)
- Create Addons
- Incendium
- Xareo's Minimap + Worldmap
- Iron's Spell & Spellbooks
- Imersive Aircraft
- Minecolonies
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Tectonic & Terralith

## Important (If you had a world on v1.8.0 or older):
- If you have a world using modpack **v1.8.0 or older**, please read the following **BEFORE updating to v1.9.0**
- In v1.9.0, Tectonic has been updated to the newest version, where world generation is completely remade
- Although updating will not cause any immediate issues, newly generated chunks will follow the new generation, where it probably will not match with existing terrain.
- Please change Tectonic back to v2.4.3 if you want to keep the previous world generation
